title: Rickr-echo variant ~
message: Rickr-~ is an echo. Not a scare, not a crash. Just repetition with extra punctuation. The red giant ball says ‘Back door unlocked’ but the back door is just another sentence. Carlos runs. Time eats the facility anyway. Workers say the answer is hidden inside the earth. Carlos spanks himself 50 times then grabs a chainsaw, then it’s still just words on a page. If something feels like it might be binary, this file refuses: it stays JSON text.
